title: Device for binding sheets
abstract: A device for binding sheets (1) comprises a feeding section (10) and a binding section (20), wherein the feeding section (10) is adapted during operation to feed sheets of papers (4) to the binding section (20). The binding section comprises a tray (22) for storing a stack of papers (4a), a stop element (24) defining a position for the stack of papers (4a), and a heating element (26) movable between an upper end position, wherein sheets of paper (4) are free to be transported to the stop element (24), and a lower position, wherein the heating element (26) exerts a pressure on a leading edge portion of the stack of papers (4a). By providing a mechanism controlling the movement of the heating element (26) comprising a rotating arm (30), an actuating element (36) connected to the heating element (26) and a spring (34a, 34b; 34') provided between the rotating arm (30) and the actuating element (36), an efficient operation of the heating element is provided.
claims:
Claims Claims 1 . A device for binding sheets (1 ) comprising a feeding section (10) and a binding section (20), wherein the feeding section (10) is adapted during operation to feed sheets of papers (4) to the binding section (20), wherein the binding section comprises a tray (22) for storing a stack of papers (4a), a stop element (24) defining a position for the stack of papers (4a), and a heating element (26) movable between an upper end position, wherein sheets of paper (4) are free to be transported to the stop element (24), and a lower position, wherein the heating element (26) exerts a pressure on a leading edge portion of the stack of papers (4a), c h a r a c t e r i z e d b y a mechanism controlling the movement of the heating element (26) comprising a rotating arm (30), an actuating element (36) connected to the heating element (26) and a spring (34a, 34b; 34') provided between the rotating arm (30) and the actuating element (36). 2. The device according to claim 1 , wherein the rotating arm is driven by an electric motor, and wherein the spring is provided between the rotating arm and the actuating element for exerting a force on the actuating element (36) towards the tray at rotation of the arm (30). 3. The device according to any one of claims 1 -2, wherein the actuating element (36) is tiltable about an axis provided above the centerline of the tray (22). 4. The device according to any one of claims 1 -3, wherein two springs (34a, 34b) are connected between the end portion of the rotating arm (30) and a respective connection point (36a, 36b) on the actuating element (36). 5. The device according to any one of claims 1 -3, wherein a single spring (34') is provided between the end portion of the rotating arm (30) and a pin (37) extending upward from the actuating element (36). 6. The device according to any one of claims 1 -5, comprising a retaining element (28), preferably arranged parallel to the heating element (26), 

 and which is movable between an upper and a lower end position and which follows the downward movement of the heating element (26). 7. The device according to any one of claims 1 -6, wherein the tray (22) is provided with a support (22a) made of a flexible material, preferably silicone rubber, in the area of the heating element (26). 8. The device according to any one of claims 1 -7, comprising a hollow tube (35a, 35b) provided around the spring (34a, 34b; 34').
